tier_rationale: Adds multiple harness schemas, scripts, and operational guide files; no product runtime behavior changes.
request_summary: Implement Validator-A wrapper and retry handoff automation.
goal: Provide safe local automation for Validator-A execution and Generator retry handoff preparation.

positive: Keep Validator execution separate from merge execution
Treat Codex CLI resource failures separately from Validator FAIL
Preserve Validator evidence fields in retry handoff
negative: Do not run real external Validator-A model execution in this task beyond dry-run
Do not implement automatic main merge in the Validator wrapper
Do not expose secrets or environment variable values

success_criteria: Validator-A handoff, Validator result, and Generator retry handoff schemas exist
run-validator-a.mjs validates handoff input and prints a safe Codex command on dry-run
prepare-generator-retry.mjs generates generator-input-retry-N.json from Validator FAIL
Repeated Validator FAIL fingerprints produce a Conflict Report instead of another retry
Operational guide and package scripts document the workflow
Harness audit and script syntax checks pass

context.relevant_history: TASK-20260429-005 selected a thin Validator controller, separate retry preparation, and no automatic merge execution.
